subject: A small ornate vial filled with deep purple liquid, held delicately between the fingers of a gloved or armored hand against a dark, shadowed background
description: A close-up still-life of a faceted glass vial cradled between thumb and fingers. The vessel glows with a translucent violet-magenta poison, catching warm highlights along its faceted edges. The hand holding it is in shadow, suggesting heavy gauntlets or thick gloves — only the silhouette of the digits is visible. The background is murky brown-black, evoking a thieves' workshop or candlelit alchemist's bench. Lighting is a single warm source from above-left, throwing the rest of the scene into deep umber shadow. The framing is intimate and conspiratorial, the viewer placed at the level of the transaction.
foreground: Gloved hand pinching a faceted vial of purple liquid
background: Indistinct shadowed interior, possibly a workbench or table edge
